-0.001 / 65
It's hard with a girlfriend when sometimes you don't want to have sex if you're doing something social outside just so you won't have anxiety. Or even just jerking off at home but knowing the day after I'll be anxious. What's fucked is I essentially live my life around this.
-0.0 / 118
If I know I have a job interview, or I'm going out on say the Wednesday, I'll jerk off or have sex on Saturday (and make sure I do nothing for the 5 days after) so I'm fine socially when the day comes. It's stupid and I don't know if there's even a fix. Alcohol sorta helps and I've tried taking 1mg of Ativan just a test, turns out not even that really did much. Is there a cure, this is seriously impacting my quality of life..
